reviews.comment:
No quisieron cargar nafta xq camion iba a descargar combustible
Camion que ni siquiera habia entrado a la estavion de servicio
Muy VAGOS

(Translated by Google)
They refused to refuel because a truck was about to unload fuel.
A truck that hadn't even entered the service station yet.
So lazy.
